reviews.review_description: I love this game very much, I love to experiment, take risks, and just have fun, but lately I’ve been thinking of some ideas that I would love to share with the devs: Wing suits, acrobatics option in the settings (this could either involve coded flips and tricks or free rotation), the ability to grab onto ledges before the jump, missions involving formations in multiplayer or solo with the bots or other tasks, random weather conditions, and having to cut the main canopy and pull a reserve. I feel that these would game the game a whole new and more thrilling experience than the game already is. All in all, still love the game 😁

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the awesome review and for sharing these ideas! Great news — a few of these are already in the sim, including acrobatics like flips/rolls, backfly, head down, plus cutaway and reserve procedures.

Some of those features can take a little time to discover, so the tutorials page on our website can help, and you can also access tutorial videos directly in the sim from the Tutorials tab.

Docking and wingsuits are actually features we’re working on now. You can also track by moving your hands into a real-world tracking position.

I love the other ideas too, especially missions/formations, and grabbing onto a ledge before jumping. I’ll add them to our list. Keep the ideas coming, and blue skies!

reviews.review_description: I love this game i play it every time i love it it has every thing like in real skydive the parachute controls i loooove it soooo much greates game ever i would liek if more people played it amd more people played multiplatformový and if i can i would try every new update before it ever realises keep the good work :) loveee it :) and pls can u add like Mire types of parachutes like paratrooper parachute and thatu need to clop it like real or normal parachute liek its in the game  and aircrafts and base jump more Maps thanks :)

developer_response.body:
Thank you so much for the awesome review! 
You can join our Facebook group (VR Flying games -powered by Skydive Sim) to connect with other players. 
 Also we push all updates to the Public Beta channel before it goes the the LIVE channel. On your headset click the 3 dots on Skydive Sim and then select settings/release channels. You can select Public Beta and get the latest updates before they go to the main outlet. 
Blue Skies!

reviews.review_description: Landed in my yard I lived as a child and where I live now. Alot of fun

reviews.review_title: Thank you for change To a higher quality
reviews.review_description:
Thank you a slider to change quality is perfect!

A big like for your team and you🙏👍👍👍

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for your honest review, and no offense taken at all. We really appreciate constructive feedback like this because it helps us improve Skydive Sim and fix issues we may not see on our end.

We've added a new Google Earth Quality slider for both Quest and PC so players can choose the level of detail that works best for their device. The default quality has also been improved, especially on PC, and high-end systems can now push it even further.
(This will be available on our Public Beta channel very soon!)

Thanks again for sharing your thoughts and helping us make the experience better for everyone!

reviews.review_description: Wont even load

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you had trouble. Skydive Sim is used by thousands of players without issue, but if something isn’t loading correctly we’re happy to help. Please reach out via the chat on our website so we can troubleshoot and get you flying.

reviews.review_description:
I just found this Sim and started playing and I've got to say I'm really enjoying it. The mechanics are awesome. The Google Earth feature is great for what it is. But, there are a couple things that just ruin the immersion for me. First, my arms seem extremely long. My real life hands are sitting approximately where my in-game wrists are and then the hands extend beyond that it's kind of off-putting. Secondly, I think the spatial audio needs some work. When another canopy opens from an AI or such it doesn't matter how far away they are from you it sounds like they're right on top of you and that too is a little off-putting.
Both of the things I mentioned are small in comparison to the enjoyment that I'm getting out of the game but they do exist so I thought I would bring them up.

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks so much for your feedback. You are correct about the AI canopies opening being loud, well look into making it spatial instead. We will check out the arms distance on our end. Can you try recentering while in the scene and see if that helps with the arms?  Feel free to let us know via chat on our website.

reviews.review_description: I was into skydiving for 5 years and had almost 300 jumps. This Sim is very on point when it comes to controlling free fall and canopy work. I love Google earth option!
Does not work. Never again.

developer_response.body: Sorry to hear you had a bad experience. We’d love to help, but we can’t fix an issue we don’t know about. Please reach out through any of the support options on our website, live chat, email, Facebook group or our Discord channel and we’ll do everything we can to get you up and running.

reviews.review_description:
I just bought it, and I had some trouble in using Google Earth but I got help from the game's support chat.
I need to learn how to skydive properly.
I had hoped that Google Earth would also be 3D, it still looks nice, except once landed it's just a flat surface. *It is 3D in some places, flat in others, due to Google Earth itself.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for your review. We are always glad to help. 

As for Google Earth 3D tiles it really depends on the location picked and what data Google has available for the area. Some places are very rich with details and some are just imagery. Google is always updating their data so we have seen more places with 3D tiles appear. Check out our featured tab in the  Google Earth menu. It takes you to some beautiful places with rich 3D tiles. 

A great way to explore is using Jet Packs. This video gives a quick tutorial on how to use them: https://youtu.be/RZKVOJdoD1U?si=22kGsSr5CyWw81Wa

Feel free to reach out if you have any questions.

reviews.review_title: Best gaming experience of my life!
reviews.review_description:
Hands down one of the most incredible gaming experiences I’ve ever had.

As a real-world skydiver, aviation enthusiast, and longtime gamer, this simulator takes everything I love and launches it to new heights — literally. The fact that I can skydive anywhere on Earth blows my mind. Whether I’m soaring past iconic landmarks, diving down sheer mountain faces in speed-flight mode, or just cruising around with rocket hands like some gravity-defying tourist in Google Earth — it never gets old.

The virtual skydiving aspect is the star of the show for me. I’m able to practice approaches, free-fly with friends and coaches, and chase that perfect Cavern run — again and again. The sense of freedom is unreal. One minute I’m threading the arm of Christ the Redeemer in Brazil, the next I’m wingsuiting through alpine valleys with nothing but pure flow and adrenaline.

This game lets me experience what the best in the world do — virtually. And the challenge modes? Absolute fire.

If you’re into flight, thrill, and open-world exploration with a real edge… this game is it. I can’t get enough. Rinse and repeat. Skies forever.

After initial difficulties launching the app, it now works perfectly. Thanks to the developers for their quick help. The app offers an immersive gaming experience in a Google Earth environment, but it is less suitable for people who tend to feel nauseous in VR.

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your review. We are always here to help with any issues!

reviews.review_description: Can't even get any further than the agreement screen. Using the meta quest pro and no controls work to enable me to click the agree button. Eye tracking is enabled controllers are fine but nothing. My pro is all up to date with latest software as well.

developer_response.body:
Hi, are you using the trigger button and clicking on the checkbox before clicking ok? Please contact us via chat on our website and we'll be happy to help you with this issue.
Thanks

reviews.review_title: Great for novices and experts alike!
reviews.review_description: I have a few real-life skydives under my belt and hope to make some more jumps soon. This app/game allows me to practice 90 degree and 360 degree turns, canopy control, landing patterns, and flaring. Lots of customizable options such as wind, gusts, clouds, and likelihood of emergencies. I have around 200 games, and this one is now in my top 5 rotation! Highly recommended!

The Skydive Sim is a must have for new skydiving students! You can practice various landing patterns at your DZ, and adjust winds as well as gusts, and even practice flaring before doing the real thing.

Malfunctions and cutaways is an added bonus. Great way to practice those EPs too!!  

Five stars!! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️

I love the mechanics and realism of this Sim and it is now my go to app for investigating new places! ￼ Take a leisurely glide through some of your favourite places at a relaxing pace and see if you can nail, those landings in those same favourite places! Also, my girlfriend is now happy that I don’t bug her anymore about going skydiving!!! thanks for giving me everything I need right here for all the realistic thrills that I can handle, cheers! ￼

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for your awesome review. It's always great to get feedback from other Skydivers! Blue Skies

reviews.review_description: Just updated the app and now it won't even let me play!!!!! And it's not my headset either. All other games load up no problem, but not this??? Just goes right back the home screen seconds later. Was a 5 star game for students trying to learn in the off season now it's 0 stars if I could even leave 0 stars. FIX IT PLEASE!!!!!

developer_response.body:
Hi, what you describe could be due to your older operating software and Skydive Sim requiring newer operating software. (If other apps are running, it is likely their developer hasn't updated their Meta SDK to require newer operating software.)

The fastest way to get support is by writing us at support@SkydiveSim.com or chat on our website. We also have a Facebook group where you can get fast support from us and other users.
We don't often check reviews to see if someone is having technical issues.
If you are still having issues loading the game please write us and we'll help you through it.

If your issue has been resolved, please consider changing your negative review.

reviews.review_description: There's only a few locations you can skydive. I tried the Google Earth thing but it just doesn't work.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. To ensure the best experience with Google Earth scenes in Skydive Sim, a stable and fast internet connection is essential. If your connection is unstable or intermittent, it can cause issues with loading the scenes properly.

We test each update thoroughly with our team and experienced users to ensure performance across various setups. If you’re still encountering issues despite having a stable connection, we recommend reaching out to our support team. We’d be happy to assist in troubleshooting and finding a solution.

You can contact us through the chat on our website at SkydiveSim.com, email us at support@skydivesim.com, or connect through our Facebook group and Discord community. We’re here to help!

reviews.review_description: Is this a bad joke? So many bugs, it's unplayable.

developer_response.body:
We’re confident in the quality of Skydive Sim, and each update is thoroughly tested by our team and a group of experienced users before release. Most players run it without issues, so if you're seeing a large number of bugs, something unusual may be going on.

We take feedback seriously and are happy to help — but we can’t fix what we don’t know about. Please contact us through the chat on our website at SkydiveSim.com, email support@skydivesim.com, or reach out via our Facebook group or Discord. We’re here to support you and want to make sure you get the experience we intended.

reviews.review_description: From the very beginning on the airplane, there was a misalignment problem that could not be corrected, and the option menu was off when called out.

developer_response.body:
Thank you for your feedback. We take great care to thoroughly test each update to Skydive Sim, both internally with our team and externally with experienced users who know the simulator well. We strive to ensure everything is working smoothly across all devices.

The issue you mentioned regarding misalignment and the option menu may be unique to your setup or experience. If you’re still encountering this problem, we’d be happy to investigate further and provide a solution. Please contact our support team through the website chat at SkydiveSim.com, or email us directly at support@skydivesim.com.

reviews.review_description: Bought this game awhile back and was super impressed, notwithstanding having never skydived in real life.  Fired it up again for the first time in a long time after the recent Google Earth update and was blown away.  Love it, immediately jumped in a hot air balloon able my work place and from above my childhood home.  Crazy.
This is the best skydiving game who ever made this game good job

As a former paraglider and skydiver I really like this game.  The cutaways, malfunctions, the aad!  Some really nice touches. Canopy physics are pretty awesome. The sim can be a useful tool for teaching altitude awareness and emergency procedures as well as canopy control. Ransom weather and an audible alti would be awesome add one. Oh and flips both on exit and in freefall.
When I played the balloon jump it was so fun

reviews.review_title: Great title with really annoying music!
reviews.review_description:
This is an amazing sim with fantastic graphics on Quest 3 headset.
It's challenging & fun and really satisfying, a must buy for any parachuting nut cases out there.


⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐
Absolutely love this app, with the new Google Earth integration,it's a great way to get the lay of the land of a new DZ before visiting IRL

I'm 71 and a SCS/SCR, JM from way back.  Made a first jump in Hawaii in 1980.  I was also a jump pilot.  Lost a lot of friends in 1981 and another in 83.
My log books show 682 leaps.

I bought this game last night.  Only had the S3 VR a couple of days.  Downloaded, installed, selected Hawaii and did the "jump" from the balloon.
I did a hop & pop from the platform and did a X-country.  The feeling of being under a canopy was surreal.  I would bury a toggle, l spiral and could feel my body whipping around!!  I purposely pulled both toggles to my hips and stalled out the canopy and released.  The canopy surged forward as expected (hated that feeling, LOL)

I did not play any of the point gathering.  All I wanted to do was fly.  
I did not recognize the terrain.  I was looking for Dillingham airfield and DZ, so I did a landing on the beach with a nice flare.  My body reacted much as under canopy and I am not doing any Shrooms!!  I could feel it.

Loved it.  Of course, I will be far more critical after "playing" more but I am stoked.  My last logged jump was 1990 in a little field north of Charleston.  The WV New River bridge jump used to be on my bucket list but a few MC wrecks killed that.
I was hoping for real terrain using something like GoogleVirtue earth.  Not sure how possible that is.  It would be so cool to jump into known DZs with real terrain.  I'd pay some serious $$ for that upgrade.

developer_response.body: Thanks for your great review. Very glad you are enjoying it. Our Google Earth integration is now in our Public Beta Channel!

reviews.review_title: People need to be online more
reviews.review_description: The game is very fun and extremely challenging. Unfortunately the graphics aren’t the best but they’re not horrible. The one down side is that it’s very hard to do multiplayer because barely anyone is ever hosting a room.

I purely bought this simulation to help with my landing, ohh man after a week of practicing i went to real world skydiving( i am a beginner though in my aff course). This simulation focking helps , hands down to the creator of it. Also tried my 360, move forward and backwards while diving. Man i cannot tell u how happy i am with this simulation. Great job ❤️❤️

developer_response.body: Thank you so much for the great review! Means a lot to know it helped out with your landings!

reviews.review_description: I'm going for my AFF soon and I love it too much and can't wait. This is the closest you can get right now for practicing and getting more comfortable with skydiving. Also, the community has the best people in it, including the owner who listens to all the suggestions. I wish I could give it 6 stars! keep it up!!

It should be called arcade skydiving, there is so much I like to say about this game, message me and I'll give you a full breakdown of everything that's wrong with this game, I feel this game should be five bucks, that's my opinion,

I purchased this game 24 hours ago and went on fb to find others to jump with, first response I got was "ill be on in a few minutes!". Gave them the room name and I found out very quickly that the creator of the game is who got on to jump with me. He taught me all about the jetpacks and how you never have to leave a map to jump again. This game is very accurate (I do have some actual jump experience) love it. Highly recommend.....
I wish you would add a mode where you could wing suit from base jumps and like a new map with mountains so I could use the wingsuits I've been wanting to wingsuit for a while now

developer_response.body: Hi, Wingsuit is something we are considering to add! Stay tuned!

reviews.review_description: I love it. But people are not on a lot, everyone needs to be on more. You spent 25$ on it and you don’t play it. It’s kinda like buying a phone to not use it. EVERYONE PLAY MORE! Also can you put the new not expired discord link in the response. I’m the comment from YouTube and I need a new link.

developer_response.body:
Hi, thanks for your awesome review! 
The multiplayer is public by default, which means you can play with anyone as long as they want to play in a public room. Many of our users setup private rooms to play with their friends only. 
You can join our Facebook Group: https://www.facebook.com/groups/skydivesim
Here is the updated discord invite: https://discord.gg/hzGw3mbP
to find people to join in multiplayer.

reviews.review_title: The best parachute Related game ever
reviews.review_description: This game provides the exhilarating feeling of real skydiving. You can base jump, leap from a balloon, plane, or helicopter, and explore numerous maps. With more content on the way, I give it a 10/10 and highly recommend it for skydiving enthusiasts.”

developer_response.body: Wow thanks so much for your awesome review!

reviews.review_description: This sim definitely has potential. You get a real sense of what it's like to jump out of a plane! There are a couple bugs here and there but they will probably get fixed. I would like to see better physics / easier control of the free falling section. Its pretty challenging to get through the hoops. But pulling the canopy and controlling it is pretty well done. Hope to see the developer keep improving the game!
Really cool and unique game ,recommended for any age. Great fun all around ! ⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️⭐️
Awesome!!!!

Be aware there is no comfort rating and I personally found this app to be very uncomfortable. Certainly very difficult to use this standing up. If I had known this I wouldn’t have purchased as it’s so uncomfortable that I won’t be using it again so I’ve wasted my money.

developer_response.body:
Hi, sorry you are having issues with the app comfort. If motion sickness is the issue, we do have a FOV Limiter under the options menu that will help with that. We have many tutorials on our website that show how to use the app and its options. Please feel free to contact us directly on our website chat or Support@SkydiveSim.com and we'll be happy to help with your concerns.
If you prefer a refund, please request one from Meta and they will refund you as long as you are in the return period.

reviews.review_description:
It's a really awesome simulator, pretty realistic. Only a few suggestions,
It would be perfect if you could rotate the altimeter to your likings,
and instead of: as soon as you touch the ground you stop, make it a bit more realstic instead of stopping as soon as you touch the ground.
But overall a really awesome game!

developer_response.body: Hi, thanks for your awesome review! I'll put the altimeter rotation into our feature requests as I think it's a great idea. Also, the sliding after landing is already on the list so it will be coming as well!

reviews.review_description: Plane,helicopter,balloon, and BASE jumps are amazing keep it up one of the best games I have ever played!

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for your awesome review. Glad yo are enjoying it!
